overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in a green jacket walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The character crosses a busy intersection, walks along a palm-tree-lined commercial sidewalk with neon billboards, and the camera eventually approaches a black luxury SUV on the street. The environment features high-end ray-traced graphics with vibrant neon signage and modern glass architecture.

events.description: black sedan drives past on the right as character begins crossing
character reaches the opposite sidewalk and steps up from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: character in green jacket and gray pants walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street perpendicular to the crosswalk

tall tropical palm trees lining the opposite sidewalk
modern glass building with prominent green neon lighting and large digital storefront displays
broad yellow and black diagonal striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide urban intersection with clear blue skies. The character crosses a broad crosswalk with yellow and black stripes while a black sedan passes by on the right. In the distance, a tall digital billboard tower rises on the left, while palm trees and a green-lit commercial building line the right side of the street.

passing by the large 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' billboard with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees casting long shadows. The camera passes other pedestrians while approaching a large building with a prominent 'SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2' digital billboard featuring purple neon lighting. The green-lit commercial building remains visible in the background on the right.

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a covered arcade with striking blue neon ceiling lights that cast a cool tint on the surroundings. A modern bus stop shelter appears on the left. The segment transitions as the character exits the covered area, revealing a street ahead with parked cars and an overhead pedestrian bridge connecting the buildings.

black Mercedes G-Wagon fills the frame as camera moves alongside the driver's window

large wall-mounted digital billboard displaying 'NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!' with image of hands holding a device
enclosed glass and metal pedestrian walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to street level, approaching a line of parked vehicles including a distinctive purple sports car with green underglow. The focus shifts to a black Mercedes G-Wagon on the left, with the camera moving alongside it to reveal the driver inside. A large billboard advertising job upgrades dominates the right wall, while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk district, transitioning from a wide, sunlit intersection into a neon-lit commercial corridor. It begins with the character crossing a broad, striped crosswalk under clear blue skies, passing a black sedan as a digital billboard tower looms in the distance. As the character moves onto a concrete sidewalk, the scene shifts toward a more commercial atmosphere, passing palm trees and a purple neon billboard for Sweet Clean Speed 2. The camera then glides beneath a covered arcade illuminated by cool blue ceiling lights and past a modern bus stop before emerging back into the open street under a pedestrian bridge. Finally, the perspective descends to street level, passing a purple sports car with green underglow to focus on a black Mercedes G-Wagon and its driver, while a large job upgrade advertisement dominates the surrounding wall.
